You can cast speak with animals without expending a spell slot.
H2 Vou cast spell using warlock slot. can compulsion once a Vou do again you a rest.This is a section from the Eldritch Invocations Rule (pages 111–112).

At level 6, learn magically yourself against an enemy's attack turning good luck into bad for them. When a creature makes an attack roll against you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on that roll. If the creature attacks you again before the end of your next turn, it has advantage on its attack roll.

You learn the Fireball cantrip and can cast it at 1st level and higher. Until you reach 5th level, the spell always deals fire damage. When you reach 5th level, you can choose to have it deal fire or force damage instead. Once you master this invocation, you can also shape the blast of force into a cone.
